claim: (HU fordítás nem elérhető) The equity case for abolition rests on a cross-national association between early tracking and SES gradients rather than Hungary-specific causal evidence, and the scenario's own uncertainty record concedes sorting could simply migrate into school choice, catchment, or non-state tracks — so the reform's full cost could be paid without its promised equity gain.
interest: (HU fordítás nem elérhető) the concern(s) raised by konzervativ_ertekvedo, fuggetlen_szakpolitikai_kutatomuhely, kisgyerekes_szuloi
value: (HU fordítás nem elérhető) a trade-off between the scenario's stated goal and the concern raised
fear: (HU fordítás nem elérhető) the benefit claimed will not materialise as described
assumption: (HU fordítás nem elérhető) the claim's premise holds under implementation as designed
empirical_uncertainty: (HU fordítás nem elérhető) not independently graded here — see the evidence layer
